scope: Coheronia v0.5 increment: data models + live enemies, player XP and base levels, playable ancestries, multi-agent review pass.
summary: Brings the first slices of the three FUTURE design docs into live gameplay. Data layer: data/enemies.json (16 enemies, bosses, density/difficulty/loot tables), data/ancestries.json (12 ancestries, dragonkin types, biome affinities), data/progression/ (XP events, base levels 1-6, research domains, perk lanes), all schema-validated. Gameplay: surface_slime replaces the hardcoded night threat, cave_crawler ambushes underground, raider_basic attacks the Town Hall per data spawn_rule, and deaths roll data-driven drops; nine XP events feed six fractional XP types into player levels (100 * 1.35^n); the settlement ratchets Camp -> Hamlet -> Village from live shelter/light/food signals and gates population growth (caps 4/6/8); character creation offers human/dwarf/elf/goblin/orc with data-derived effects (dwarf mining/speed, orc health, elf jump, goblin fragility, human learning). Save version 0.5 accepts 0.4. A 7-angle review fixed 17 verified findings including restored raiders losing hall_dps and fractional XP lost to rounding.
acceptance: validate_repo.py validates all v0.5 data schemas -> RESULT scaffold_valid
Three live enemies spawn per family rules, drop loot, and round-trip saves with id/hp/max_hp/hall_dps
density_mult and loot_mult from enemies.json drive spawn counts and drop chances
XP accrues from nine wired events; human 1.05x yields 21 vs 20 labor XP over 20 mining events
Base level advances one tier per check, fail-closed on unknown requirement keys, and gates population growth at 4/6/8
Ancestry effects verified: dwarf 0.9x move / 1.2x stone-ore mining, orc 125 max health, elf 1.15x jump, goblin 80 max health
Underground enemies survive the dawn sweep; peaceful worlds spawn no cave crawlers
Smoke suite 90/90 (was 62), exit 0, results JSON + screenshot written
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> RESULT scaffold_valid (after every wave and at closeout)
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> PASS 90/90 at 2026-07-03T10:52:24
decisions: Data-first waves: all three doc matrices landed as validated JSON before any gameplay code, so the validator gates every later change
Base-level population caps tuned to 4/6/8 (doc example had camp 2) because the game starts at population 4; growth gate wired only after the data supported it
xp_totals stored as floats with int() at read points so sub-1.0 learning multipliers accrue instead of vanishing to rounding
Raider spawn thresholds moved into enemies.json spawn_rule rather than code constants
Restored threats go through the real _spawn_enemy_at path so saved and fresh enemies can never diverge
Refuted-but-notable review candidates (0.4-save growth gating, rollback save incompatibility) documented in HANDOFF instead of code changes
Orchestration: schema-contract prompts, disjoint file ownership, inline verification, haiku/sonnet model tiering; 14 subagents total
risks: Raider pressure, XP pacing, and base-level thresholds untested by human play
0.4 saves face a new base-level growth gate (documented)
Deep ancestries await underground-safe spawn generation
next_action: Operator playthrough; then farming + crafting menu, then research bench MVP.
